_fixtureScope: Known subset for DeckKit engine tests; not a complete jurisdiction package.
_sourceNotes: BCBC 2024 Division B Table 9.8.4.1: private stair maximum rise is 200 mm.
BCBC 2024 Division B Table 9.8.4.2: private stair minimum run is 255 mm.
BCBC 2024 Division B 9.8.8.1: guards are required where the walking surface is more than 600 mm above the adjacent surface within 1.2 m.
BCBC 2024 Division B 9.8.8.3: exterior guards serving not more than one dwelling unit are not less than 900 mm high when the walking surface is not more than 1 800 mm above finished ground.
BCBC 2024 Division B 9.8.8.5: guard openings prevent passage of a 100 mm sphere.

BCBC 2024 Division B 9.8.9.4 has wooden stair stringer rules, but this fixture leaves notchedStringerSizing empty because the current DeckKit row shape requires a max length cell not represented by this source-backed subset.

ledgerRules.codeSection: BCBC 2024 Part 9 ledger fixture not represented
